critical_recommendation.action: GSC Request Indexing for 20k loan blog (IMMEDIATE — was recommended Jun 28, still not done)
critical_recommendation.justification: THIS IS NOW AN EMERGENCY. The #1 click candidate has dropped from 31 imp to 0 in 3 weeks while Google hasn't recrawled it in 25 days. The restructured content (Phase 35) is invisible. Every day without recrawl risks permanent ranking loss. A single Request Indexing via CloakBrowser GSC UI would trigger recrawl within hours. This was the single most impactful action identified on Jun 28 — it is now 2x more urgent.
critical_recommendation.risk: LOW — page is already indexed, position was stable. Request Indexing only asks Google to recrawl.
critical_recommendation.also_recommend: Request Indexing for compound-interest (last crawl Jun 1, 28 days ago) and mortgage-calculator.

overall_assessment.scoreboard: OFF_TRACK — 20k blog vanished, impressions at new low, no recrawl
overall_assessment.summary: DAY 4 POST-PHASE 35. The situation has deteriorated. The 20k loan blog — our clear #1 click candidate at position 7.1 with 31 weekly impressions — has dropped to ZERO detectable impressions in the latest GSC window. It hasn't been recrawled in 25 days. Parent calculator impressions are declining (compound: 6→2, mortgage: 7→2, loan: 5→1) while tool variants continue to cannibalize at 12-13.5x. Total impressions hit a new low of 352 (down 29.3% from the 498 peak 3 weeks ago). 0 clicks in the 7-day window. Phase 35/36 fixes are deployed and verified live, but Google sees none of them. The single most impactful action — GSC Request Indexing for the 20k blog — was identified 2 days ago but remains unexecuted. Without a recrawl trigger, QFINHUB is bleeding rankings on its best pages while waiting for Google's natural crawl cycle. Scoreboard: OFF_TRACK. Critical path: 20k blog recrawl → ranking recovery → first content click.
overall_assessment.critical_path: 20k blog GSC Request Indexing → recrawl within hours → ranking recovery → first content click → validates architecture repair → expand to parent calculators.
